results.title: LPTH 2026 Investor Day Presentation
results.snippet: LightPath Technologies' 2026 Investor Day presentation highlights their transformation in infrared optics and imaging, with defense revenue dominating, a shift from China manufacturing to U.S. and EU facilities, and a $97 million order backlog as of late 2025.

results.title: LightPath Technologies Receives $9.6 Million Purchase Order for Cooled Infrared Cameras from Existing Defense Customer
results.snippet: LightPath Technologies (NASDAQ: LPTH) secured a $9.6 million purchase order for cooled infrared cameras from an existing defense customer, with deliveries scheduled throughout calendar year 2026.

results.title: LightPath Stock Price: Track LPTH Performance in 2026
results.snippet: This page offers real-time updates and historical data to track LightPath Technologies (LPTH) stock performance throughout 2026.

results.title: LightPath Technologies, Inc. Q2 2026 Earnings Call
results.snippet: During the Q2 2026 earnings call, LightPath discussed growth from the G5 Infrared acquisition, over $80 million in new orders, transition from germanium to proprietary Black Diamond glass, and plans to redesign their camera portfolio by autumn 2026.

results.title: LightPath Technologies Reports Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Financial Results
results.snippet: LightPath reported fiscal 2026 Q2 results including a $9.6 million order for cooled IR cameras and a $4.8 million order for public safety IR systems, with a $97.8 million backlog and continued shift to BlackDiamond glass for defense applications.

results.title: Thermal Imaging Drone Technology for CUAS: 2026 OEM Guide
results.snippet: LightPath Technologies delivers premium optical and thermal imaging solutions for aerospace, defense, and critical infrastructure applications. With over four decades of experience and proprietary Black Diamond chalcogenide glass technology, they support mission-critical counter-drone programs.

results.title: How to Choose a Thermal Imaging Camera System in 2026
results.snippet: LightPath Technologies provides expertise in thermal imaging suitable for drone payloads under SWaP constraints. Uncooled systems offer smaller size, lower power use, and reduced maintenance for surveillance, monitoring, and continuous operation.

results.title: How to Strengthen Your Infrared Optics Supply Chain in 2026
results.snippet: LightPath Technologies offers vertically integrated North American manufacturing for infrared optics in drone programs. This ensures compliance, reliability, and simplified integration for defense applications with tight SWaP requirements.

results.title: Drone Thermal Imaging Camera Integration for OEMs
results.snippet: This guide helps OEMs select and integrate thermal imaging cameras for drones. LightPath provides complete assemblies from materials to finished systems for aerial thermal platforms.

results.title: Focusing on imaging systems, LightPath Technologies recent transition leads to global expansion with drone detection
results.snippet: LightPath Technologies focuses on complete imaging systems for long-distance drone detection in security and military uses in 2026. Following their G5 Infrared acquisition, they are scaling production to meet growing backlogs for counter-drone cameras.

results.title: LightPath Technologies Inc (LPTH) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Surge
results.snippet: LightPath Technologies Inc (LPTH) reported a 120% increase in revenue for Q2 2026, reaching $16.4 million compared to $7.4 million in the same quarter last year. The company achieved a gross profit increase of 212%, with gross margins improving to 37% from 26% in the previous year.

results.title: LightPath Technologies (LPTH) Stock Forecast
results.snippet: Financial analysts have set a price target of $13.33 for LightPath Technologies (LPTH) indicating a Strong Buy consensus rating as of April 2026.

results.title: LightPath Technologies Reports Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Financial Results
results.snippet: LightPath Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: LPTH) announced financial results for its fiscal second quarter ended December 31, 2025. The company is a leading provider of next-generation optics and imaging systems for defense and commercial applications.

results.title: Should I Buy LPTH? LPTH 2026 Analysis
results.snippet: In Q2 2026, LightPath revenue increased by over 120% year-over-year to $16.35 million with significant gross margin improvement. Analysts maintain Buy ratings with updated price targets up to $15.
